mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_events (exchange_name, routing_key, payload_type, payload_json, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error) VALUES (#{exchangeName}, #{routingKey}, #{payloadType}, #{payloadJson}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError})
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_events SET status = 'SENDING' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE outbox_events SET status = 'SENT', sent_at = #{sentAt}, last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING'
UPDATE outbox_events SET status = 'PENDING', retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING'
